zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry De La Pomeroy於1265年出生在英國可瓦爾特雷恭尼時，他的父親Henry De La Pomeray50歲，母親Isolda Pomeroy75歲。他於1281年6月1日與Amicia de Camville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年9月在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry De La Pomeroy was born in 1265, in Tregony, Cornwall, England, his father, Henry De La Pomeray, was 50 and his mother, Isolda Pomeroy, was 75. He married Amicia de Camville on 1 June 1281. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in September 1305, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry De La Pomeroy est né en 1265, à Tregony, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Henry De La Pomeray, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Isolda Pomeroy, avait 75 ans. Il a épousé Amicia de Camville le 1 juin 1281. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en septembre 1305, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry De La Pomeroy 1265 in Tregony, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De La Pomeray 50 und seine Mutter Isolda Pomeroy 75. Er hat am 1. Juni 1281 Amicia de Camville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im September 1305 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De La Pomeroyが1265年にイギリスコルンワルトレゴニーで生まれた時，父Henry De La Pomerayは50歳，母Isolda Pomeroyは75歳であった。1281年6月1日にAmicia de Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年9月にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De La Pomeroy(이)가 1265년 영국 코른월 트레곤이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De La Pomeray(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda Pomeroy(은)는 75세였다. 그는 1281년 6월 1일 Amicia de Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry De La Pomeroy nasceu em 1265, em Tregony, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De La Pomeray, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Isolda Pomeroy, tinha 75 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia de Camville em 1 de junho de 1281. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1305, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry De La Pomeroy родился в 1265 г. в местности трегони, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry De La Pomeray было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda Pomeroy, 75. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia de Camville 1 июня 1281 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер сентябрь 1305 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
